code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn target() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let t = target()
let body = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(body)

mut count = 0
mut current = ""
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(body, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if current == t
      count = count + 1
    end
    current = ""
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  if current == t
    count = count + 1
  end
end

print("count=#{count}")
